title: Update: Truck overturns in Kaaimans Pass
description: GEORGE NEWS - SAPS spokesperson for the...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - SAPS spokesperson for the Southern Cape Sgt Chris Spies has confirmed that no injuries were reported in the truck accident in the Kaapmans Pass this afternoon, Sunday 14 April.

Spies said the truck overturned at approximately 14:50.

Both double lanes in the pass were closed while the overturned vehicle was being moved.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
